oai_dc:dc.dc:title: $10 Raffle 1 in 120 Chance to Win
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Staff, AFA Watchbird
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 51 Number 2 (April/May 2024).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Pin #37 of the series CITES—Convention on the International Trade of Endangered Species All profits from these items go into a special fund to send a representative to conventions to protect the interests of aviculture.American Federation of Aviculture P.O. Box 91717 Austin, TX 78709 Start or add to your collection today! The Indian Ringneck Parakeet (Psittacula krameria) is the newest CITES collector pin in the series $12.99 LIMITED EDITION Use the QR Code to Purchase Tickets https://afabirds.org/2018_WordPress/conference-registration-2023/ Special-$10-Raffle-Win-a-full-AFA-Conference-Registration-with-4-nighthotel-stay-for-the-2024-AFA-conference-p377553141 Win a Full Registration, Saturday Night Banquet, and 4 nights in the Conference Hotel.1 in 120 chance to win. A winner will be pulled after 120 tickets are sold. Winners who have already paid for registration will be reimbursed. Visit the AFA website for the latest legislative information affecting our rights to keep and enjoy our birds.Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 51 No. 2 (2024): Watchbird April/May 2024; 28
